_meta.description: SHINE Access Point — JSON project fallback database
_meta.usage: Loaded by project_engine.py when MySQL returns < 3 results

Beginner.title: Student Register App
Beginner.description: A web form that lets a teacher register student names and mark daily attendance. Stores data in MySQL and shows a simple attendance table.

Beginner.title: Class Attendance Logger
Beginner.description: Log attendance per class period. Supports multiple subjects and generates per-student percentage. Export report to CSV.

Beginner.title: Attendance Report Viewer
Beginner.description: Reads attendance records and displays colourful monthly reports. Teacher can filter by student or date range.

Intermediate.title: Attendance Portal with Login
Intermediate.description: Teacher and student login, per-class attendance marking, defaulter list generation, and PDF report export.

Intermediate.title: Smart Attendance Dashboard
Intermediate.description: Role-based system (admin, teacher, student) with real-time attendance charts and CSV/PDF export.

Intermediate.title: Geo-Fenced Attendance System
Intermediate.description: Students mark attendance only within campus GPS boundary. Live map view for admin and analytics dashboard.

Advanced.title: Face Recognition Attendance
Advanced.description: Automated attendance using OpenCV face detection. Stores face embeddings in DB, real-time marking, and admin analytics.

Advanced.title: Blockchain Attendance Ledger
Advanced.description: Tamper-proof attendance records stored on a private blockchain. Smart contracts enforce rules; admin can audit full history.

Advanced.title: AI-Powered Attendance Predictor
Advanced.description: Predicts students likely to fall below attendance threshold using ML. Sends automated alerts and generates trend reports.

Beginner.title: Book Catalogue Browser
Beginner.description: A searchable list of library books with title, author, and availability status stored in MySQL.

Beginner.title: Library Issue Tracker
Beginner.description: Track which books are issued to which student. Admin records issue and return dates and views overdue books.

Beginner.title: Simple Book Search App
Beginner.description: Search books by title or author. Results show cover image, genre, and shelf location. Admin adds books via form.

Intermediate.title: Library Member Portal
Intermediate.description: Member registration, book catalogue with filters, issue history per member, and automatic fine calculation.

Intermediate.title: Library Management with Notifications
Intermediate.description: Full library system with due-date email reminders, reservation queue, and admin dashboard with inventory reports.

Intermediate.title: E-Library with PDF Viewer
Intermediate.description: Digital library where users read PDFs in-browser. Tracks reading progress, supports bookmarks, and admin upload panel.

Advanced.title: Smart Library Recommendation Engine
Advanced.description: Recommends books based on borrowing history using collaborative filtering. Analytics dashboard for admin.

Advanced.title: RFID-Based Library System
Advanced.description: Books tagged with RFID auto-check-in/check-out at gates. Dashboard tracks real-time inventory and usage analytics.

Advanced.title: Library API with Mobile App
Advanced.description: RESTful library backend with JWT auth. Mobile app lets students search, reserve, and renew books.

Beginner.title: Patient Registration Form
Beginner.description: A form to register new patients with name, age, and ailment. Records stored in MySQL, admin can view patient list.

Beginner.title: Doctor Schedule Viewer
Beginner.description: Displays available doctor slots for the week. Patients can view schedules; admin manages availability.

Beginner.title: Basic Medical Records App
Beginner.description: Store and view patient visit records — diagnosis, prescribed medicines, and doctor notes. Simple CRUD interface.

Intermediate.title: Clinic Appointment Manager
Intermediate.description: Online appointment booking with doctor selection, date/time slot picker, and confirmation email.

Intermediate.title: Hospital Patient Portal
Intermediate.description: Patients log in to view medical history, book appointments, and download prescriptions. Doctors update records.

Intermediate.title: Pharmacy Inventory System
Intermediate.description: Track medicine stock, suppliers, expiry dates, and auto-reorder alerts. Integrates with prescription module.

Advanced.title: Telemedicine Platform
Advanced.description: Video consultation platform with patient-doctor chat, prescription upload, appointment scheduling, and payment gateway.

Advanced.title: Hospital AI Diagnostic Assistant
Advanced.description: Symptom-checker powered by ML that suggests probable diagnoses. Feeds into doctor review workflow with confidence scores.

Advanced.title: Hospital ERP System
Advanced.description: End-to-end hospital ERP: patient management, billing, payroll, inventory, lab results, and analytics.

Beginner.title: Simple Product Store
Beginner.description: Display products from MySQL with image, price, and category. Users can browse; admin manages catalogue.

Beginner.title: Category Filter Shop
Beginner.description: Product listing with category-based filter and price sort. Products managed by admin via a hidden dashboard.

Beginner.title: Product Search Engine
Beginner.description: Live search bar that filters products as user types. Search across title, description, and category stored in MySQL.

Intermediate.title: Shopping Cart App
Intermediate.description: Add/remove items to cart, calculate totals, and place orders. Order history saved in MySQL. User authentication required.

Intermediate.title: E-Commerce with Reviews
Intermediate.description: Full shopping site with product ratings, user reviews, wishlist, and admin panel to manage products and orders.

Intermediate.title: Multi-Vendor Marketplace
Intermediate.description: Multiple sellers register shops; buyers browse and order from any seller. Admin approves sellers and mediates disputes.

Advanced.title: E-Commerce with Payment Gateway
Advanced.description: Complete store with Razorpay/Stripe integration, order tracking emails, inventory control, and React frontend.

Advanced.title: E-Commerce Recommendation Engine
Advanced.description: Product recommendations using collaborative filtering on purchase history. Includes A/B testing framework.

Advanced.title: Headless Commerce API
Advanced.description: REST API-first commerce backend with JWT auth, GraphQL queries, Redis caching, and a React storefront.

Beginner.title: Sentiment Analyser
Beginner.description: Enter text and get a positive/negative/neutral sentiment result using a pre-trained model. Simple Flask+HTML interface.

Beginner.title: Image Classifier Demo
Beginner.description: Upload an image and classify it into categories using a pre-trained CNN. Shows top-3 predictions with confidence.

Beginner.title: Simple Rule-Based Chatbot
Beginner.description: Rule-based chatbot that answers predefined FAQs using keyword matching. Deployed as a Flask web app.

Intermediate.title: ML Spam Detector
Intermediate.description: Train a Naive Bayes classifier on SMS/email data. Web interface to type a message and check if it is spam.

Intermediate.title: Movie Recommendation System
Intermediate.description: Collaborative filtering recommender trained on ratings dataset. Enter a movie title and get 5 similar recommendations.

Intermediate.title: Handwriting Recognition App
Intermediate.description: Draw a digit on a canvas; a trained CNN predicts the number instantly. Model trained on MNIST dataset.

Advanced.title: Real-Time Object Detection App
Advanced.description: Detect objects in a live webcam stream using YOLO. Annotated frames streamed to browser via Flask.

Advanced.title: NLP Question Answering System
Advanced.description: Upload a PDF; system extracts text and answers natural-language questions using a Transformer model.

Advanced.title: AI Code Review Bot
Advanced.description: Analyses student Python code for errors, style issues, and complexity. Returns detailed review with suggestions.

Beginner.title: CSV Data Explorer
Beginner.description: Upload a CSV and instantly see column statistics, data types, and a preview table. Built with Pandas and Flask.

Beginner.title: Simple Bar Chart Generator
Beginner.description: Upload tabular data; tool generates a bar chart using Matplotlib. Download the chart as PNG.

Beginner.title: Student Grade Analyser
Beginner.description: Enter student marks; app calculates mean, median, pass/fail rate, and renders a grade distribution chart.

Intermediate.title: Sales Trend Dashboard
Intermediate.description: Upload monthly sales CSV; dashboard shows trend lines, top products, and seasonal patterns using Plotly.

Intermediate.title: COVID Data Visualisation
Intermediate.description: Fetch public COVID dataset, clean with Pandas, and display interactive country-wise charts on a world map.

Intermediate.title: Housing Price Predictor
Intermediate.description: Linear regression model predicts house price from area, rooms, and location features. Web form for predictions.

Advanced.title: Customer Churn Predictor
Advanced.description: Train a Random Forest on telecom data to predict customer churn. Interactive dashboard shows feature importance.

Advanced.title: Real-Time Stock Market Analyser
Advanced.description: Stream live stock data via API, calculate moving averages, and display interactive candlestick charts.

Advanced.title: Financial Fraud Detection System
Advanced.description: Anomaly detection on transaction data using Isolation Forest and AutoEncoder. Real-time alert dashboard.

Beginner.title: Password Strength Checker
Beginner.description: Enter a password and get an instant strength score (Weak/Fair/Strong) with improvement tips. No passwords stored.

Beginner.title: Caesar Cipher Tool
Beginner.description: Encrypt and decrypt messages using Caesar cipher. User selects shift value; tool shows cipher text in real time.

Beginner.title: Basic Port Scanner
Beginner.description: Enter an IP/hostname; tool scans a port range and reports open/closed ports. Result displayed in a table.

Intermediate.title: Secure Password Manager
Intermediate.description: Store encrypted passwords in MySQL. Master password decrypts vault locally. Clipboard copy and password generator.

Intermediate.title: Network Traffic Analyser
Intermediate.description: Capture network packets with Scapy, parse protocols, and display live packet summary in a Flask dashboard.

Intermediate.title: Phishing URL Detector
Intermediate.description: ML model classifies URLs as phishing or legitimate based on lexical features. Web form for URL submission.

Advanced.title: Intrusion Detection System
Advanced.description: Monitor network traffic, detect anomalous patterns using ML, and trigger alerts with packet capture logging.

Advanced.title: Secure File Sharing App
Advanced.description: AES-encrypted file upload/download platform. Files encrypted at rest, temporary signed URLs, and audit trail.

Advanced.title: Web Vulnerability Scanner
Advanced.description: Automated web vulnerability scanner — checks for SQLi, XSS, CSRF, open redirects, and security headers.

Beginner.title: LED Brightness Controller
Beginner.description: Control an LED brightness via a web slider. Arduino reads PWM signal from serial; Flask serves the control page.

Beginner.title: Temperature Monitor Dashboard
Beginner.description: DHT11 sensor reads temperature; Raspberry Pi sends data to Flask server. Dashboard shows current reading.

Beginner.title: Button-Triggered Notification
Beginner.description: Press a physical button; Arduino sends signal via serial to Flask which emails or notifies the user.

Intermediate.title: Smart Home Dashboard
Intermediate.description: Control multiple GPIO pins (lights, fans) from a web dashboard. State persisted in MySQL; mobile-responsive UI.

Intermediate.title: IoT Environment Monitor
Intermediate.description: Multi-sensor station (temperature, humidity, air quality) feeds real-time data to a Plotly dashboard via MQTT.

Intermediate.title: Plant Watering Automation System
Intermediate.description: Soil moisture sensor triggers water pump via relay. Web dashboard shows moisture history and manual override.

Advanced.title: Smart Energy Monitor
Advanced.description: Current sensors measure appliance power consumption. Real-time dashboard shows usage, cost, and carbon footprint.

Advanced.title: Industrial Anomaly Detector
Advanced.description: Vibration and temperature sensors feed ML model that detects machine anomalies before failure occurs.

Advanced.title: Smart City Traffic System
Advanced.description: Traffic sensors count vehicles per lane; ML model adjusts signal timings dynamically. Live map dashboard.

Beginner.title: Static Site Deployment Guide
Beginner.description: Deploy a simple HTML/CSS site on AWS S3 / Netlify. Includes step-by-step documentation and Bash setup scripts.

Beginner.title: Dockerised Flask App
Beginner.description: Package a Flask app in a Docker container and run it locally. Includes Dockerfile, .dockerignore, and docs.

Beginner.title: Cloud File Storage App
Beginner.description: Upload files to AWS S3 via a Flask web form. Files listed with download links. Credentials managed via env vars.

Intermediate.title: Docker Compose Web Stack
Intermediate.description: Flask + MySQL + Nginx all orchestrated with Docker Compose. One command spins up the full application stack.

Intermediate.title: CI/CD Pipeline with GitHub Actions
Intermediate.description: Automated test-and-deploy pipeline: push to GitHub triggers tests, builds Docker image, and deploys to AWS EC2.

Intermediate.title: Serverless API with AWS Lambda
Intermediate.description: Build a CRUD REST API deployed as serverless functions on AWS Lambda with DynamoDB as the database.

Advanced.title: Kubernetes Microservices App
Advanced.description: Decompose a monolith into 3 microservices deployed on a Kubernetes cluster. Includes Helm charts and auto-scaling.

Advanced.title: Multi-Region Disaster Recovery
Advanced.description: Flask app deployed across two AWS regions. Route 53 health checks auto-failover on region outage.

Advanced.title: Cloud Cost Optimiser Dashboard
Advanced.description: Fetches AWS Cost Explorer data, analyses spending by service and tag, and surfaces optimisation recommendations.

Beginner.title: Simple To-Do App
Beginner.description: Add, complete, and delete tasks from a clean interface. Data saved in MySQL so tasks persist across page refreshes.

Beginner.title: Priority To-Do List
Beginner.description: Assign High/Medium/Low priority to tasks. Sorted list view with colour-coded priorities and done/undone toggle.

Beginner.title: Daily Planner App
Beginner.description: Organise tasks by day. Calendar-style view shows tasks per date. Simple drag-and-drop reordering.

Intermediate.title: Team Task Board
Intermediate.description: Kanban-style board with To-Do, In Progress, and Done columns. Tasks can be assigned to team members.

Intermediate.title: Project Management Tool
Intermediate.description: Create projects with multiple tasks, set deadlines and assignees, receive deadline reminders via email.

Intermediate.title: Recurring Task Scheduler
Intermediate.description: Set tasks that recur daily/weekly/monthly. Auto-generates new task entries and sends reminder notifications.

Advanced.title: Full PM Suite with Gantt Chart
Advanced.description: End-to-end project management with Gantt chart visualisation, resource allocation, milestone tracking, and team chat.

Advanced.title: AI Task Prioritiser
Advanced.description: ML model suggests task priority based on deadline, dependencies, and historical completion patterns.

Advanced.title: Enterprise Task REST API
Advanced.description: Fully RESTful task management API with JWT auth, role-based permissions, webhooks, and API rate limiting.

Beginner.title: Basic HTML Resume
Beginner.description: A single-page online resume with name, education, skills, and contact info. No JavaScript required.

Beginner.title: Animated Portfolio Page
Beginner.description: Personal portfolio with CSS animations, skills section, project cards, and a mailto contact button.

Beginner.title: Portfolio with Photo Gallery
Beginner.description: Showcase your photos in a responsive grid with lightbox pop-ups. Admin adds images via a simple upload form.

Intermediate.title: Portfolio with Live Projects
Intermediate.description: Dynamic portfolio that fetches your GitHub repos via API and displays them as project cards with live demo links.

Intermediate.description: Portfolio combined with a blog engine. Write/edit posts in Markdown; posts stored in MySQL. Responsive design.

Intermediate.title: Portfolio CMS
Intermediate.description: Content management system lets you add/edit skills, projects, and testimonials from admin panel without touching code.

Advanced.title: Portfolio with Analytics
Advanced.description: Portfolio site that tracks visitor count, page views, and time on page. Dashboard shows visual analytics to owner.

Advanced.description: Multi-user portfolio platform — users register, build their own portfolio, and share a public URL. Admin moderation.

Advanced.title: 3D Interactive Portfolio
Advanced.description: Portfolio with Three.js 3D animations, WebGL effects, and API-driven content. Hosted on cloud with CI/CD pipeline.

Beginner.description: A basic calculator mobile app supporting arithmetic operations. Built with Flutter for cross-platform use.

Beginner.title: Notes App
Beginner.description: Create, edit, and delete text notes. Data persisted locally using SQLite. Clean material design interface.

Beginner.description: Convert between units of length, weight, temperature, and currency. Offline-capable with local database.

Intermediate.description: Browse and search movies from TMDB API. Save favourites locally. Smooth animations and responsive grid.

Intermediate.description: Log workouts, track daily steps with pedometer, set goals, and visualise progress with charts.

Advanced.description: Cross-platform chat with authentication, group chats, push notifications, and media sharing via Firebase.

Advanced.description: Uber-like mobile app with live driver tracking, fare calculation, OTP verification, and payment gateway.

Advanced.title: E-Commerce Mobile App
Advanced.description: Full-featured shopping app with product catalogue, cart, checkout, payment integration, and order tracking.

Beginner.title: Simple Blockchain Simulator
Beginner.description: Build a basic blockchain from scratch in Python. Demonstrates hashing, blocks, chains, and proof-of-work.

Beginner.description: Fetch live crypto prices from CoinGecko API and display in a clean dashboard with price change indicators.

Intermediate.description: DApp that dispenses test tokens on a testnet. Smart contract in Solidity; UI with React and MetaMask integration.

Advanced.description: Bridge assets between two EVM-compatible chains. Includes lock-and-mint mechanism and oracle price feeds.

Beginner.title: Currency Converter
Beginner.description: Convert between 150+ currencies using live exchange rates from a free API. Historical rate chart included.

Intermediate.description: Track stocks, mutual funds, and crypto investments. Calculates returns, portfolio allocation, and P&L.

Intermediate.description: Send and receive money between users. Transaction history, balance display, and QR code payments.

Advanced.title: Open Banking API Platform

Intermediate.description: Teachers create custom quizzes, assign to classes, and view per-student results. Students get instant feedback.

Beginner.title: Static Chat UI
